🏹Meet the Archery Club MMU
 - Malacca Board of Committees 2025/2026🏹

Driven by focus, fueled by passion, and united by dedication, this outstanding team is set to sharpen their skills, aim higher, and lead the club towards greater achievements. Together, they stand ready to make every shot count and elevate Archery Club MMU to the next level!

”LA AQUERO“
”FOCUS . AIM . BELIEVE “

Archery Friendly Match 2026 has Officially Come to an End! 🎯

A heartfelt thank you to UTeM, UNM, and Taylor’s for joining us in this wonderful friendly match. Your presence, enthusiasm, and sportsmanship truly brought life to the range and made the event meaningful for everyone involved.

Throughout the competition, archers showcased not only their focus and determination, but also a strong sense of camaraderie and mutual respect. It was inspiring to see everyone pushing their limits while still supporting one another.

A special shout-out to our top performers for their outstanding achievements and consistency—your dedication has truly paid off!

To all participants, organizers, and supporters—thank you for making this event such a memorable one. We hope this match has strengthened friendships and created lasting memories.

See you all on the range again soon—keep aiming high and believing in every shot!

“LA ARQUERO”
“FOCUS. AIM. BELIEVE.”

SIM YI TING: 017-993 0286 (Director)
TAN ZHI ROU: 011-1549 8628 (Co-Director)
